name: Guangdong Jinma Entertainment Corporation Limited
summary: Guangdong Jinma Entertainment Corporation Limited designs, manufactures, installs, and manages amusement rides in China and internationally. It offers roller coasters, tower rides, water rides, giant wheels, classic rides, carousels, family rides, scenery trains, and dark rides. The company was formerly known as Golden Horse Technology Entertainment Corporation Limited and changed its name to Guangdong Jinma Entertainment Corporation Limited in February 2021. Guangdong Jinma Entertainment Corporation Limited was founded in 2007 and is based in Zhongshan, China.
